mapper.sql: execution_id, script_id, execution_name, execution_status, start_time, end_time, duration, execution_result, error_message, execution_params, executor_id, enterprise_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT e.execution_id, e.script_id, e.execution_name, e.execution_status, e.start_time, e.end_time, e.duration, e.execution_result, e.error_message, e.execution_params, e.executor_id, e.enterprise_id, e.create_time, e.update_time, s.script_name, u.user_name AS executor_name FROM datacloud_script_execution e LEFT JOIN datacloud_script s ON e.script_id = s.script_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.executor_id = u.user_id WHERE e.script_id = #{scriptId} AND e.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY e.start_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM datacloud_script_execution WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} AND execution_status = 'success'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM datacloud_script_execution WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} AND execution_status = 'failed'
SELECT AVG(duration) FROM datacloud_script_execution WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} AND execution_status = 'success' AND duration IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_executions, COUNT(CASE WHEN execution_status = 'success' THEN 1 END) AS success_executions, COUNT(CASE WHEN execution_status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) AS failed_executions, COUNT(CASE WHEN execution_status = 'running' THEN 1 END) AS running_executions, COUNT(CASE WHEN execution_status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) AS cancelled_executions, AVG(CASE WHEN execution_status = 'success' AND duration IS NOT NULL THEN duration END) AS avg_duration FROM datacloud_script_execution WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
SELECT execution_status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM datacloud_script_execution WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} GROUP BY execution_status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT s.script_id, s.script_name, COUNT(e.execution_id) AS execution_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.execution_status = 'success' THEN 1 END) AS success_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.execution_status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) AS failed_count FROM datacloud_script s LEFT JOIN datacloud_script_execution e ON s.script_id = e.script_id WHERE s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} GROUP BY s.script_id, s.script_name ORDER BY execution_count DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT e.execution_id, e.script_id, e.execution_name, e.execution_status, e.start_time, e.end_time, e.duration, e.execution_result, e.error_message, e.execution_params, e.executor_id, e.enterprise_id, e.create_time, e.update_time, s.script_name, u.user_name AS executor_name FROM datacloud_script_execution e LEFT JOIN datacloud_script s ON e.script_id = s.script_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.executor_id = u.user_id WHERE e.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY e.start_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
